topics.title: Aaron Spelling's Career and Legacy
topics.summary: The studio explores the prolific career of producer Aaron Spelling, detailing his rise to power at ABC, his production of hit shows like Dynasty and Beverly Hills 90210, and his personal history of overcoming early hardships.

topics.title: Celebrity Wealth, Fear of Flying, and Film Reviews
topics.summary: The show explores the extravagant lifestyle of Aaron Spelling, Warren Buffett's charitable intentions, personal fears regarding air travel, and a review of the film The Devil Wears Prada.

topics.title: Celebrity Weight Issues and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dangers of public commentary on weight, specifically regarding Catherine McPhee and Carney Wilson, while also touching on Adam Sandler's box office success and a recent charity event.

topics.title: Studio Dynamics and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio explores a variety of topics including personal anecdotes about industry parties, celebrity news regarding Nicole Kidman and Busta Rhymes, and internal discussions regarding production logistics and staff behavior.

topics.title: Parenting Challenges and Media Influence
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of television on child-rearing, the ritual of bedtime routines, and the management of fan mail and promotional activities.

topics.title: Celebrity Interviews and Playboy Evaluations
topics.summary: The studio features a series of prank calls, celebrity interviews with Bo Derek and Mamie Van Doren, and a discussion regarding upcoming Playboy submissions.

topics.title: Playboy Model Evaluation
topics.summary: The studio evaluates a candidate named Shannon Gary for Playboy, discussing her physical appearance, potential for photography, and comparison to previous models.

topics.title: Playboy Casting Evaluations
topics.summary: The studio evaluates several women who submitted photos for Playboy, debating their physical suitability and potential for a professional photo shoot.

topics.title: Cheap Trick Interview and Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with the band Cheap Trick, where they discuss their career history, past musical conflicts, and upcoming projects.

topics.title: Cheap Trick Band History and Performance
topics.summary: The studio features members of Cheap Trick discussing their history, the creation of their hit songs, past substance use, and a near-collaboration with KISS.

topics.title: Cheap Trick Interview and Eric the Midget Segment
topics.summary: The show features an interview with members of Cheap Trick regarding their new album, followed by a comedic segment involving a man named Eric who is teased about his aspirations to meet celebrities.

topics.title: The Friday Show Staffing Changes
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential rotations for the Friday show, specifically addressing listener feedback regarding Ralph's role and Sal's frequent sound effects.

topics.title: Archiving Old Show Tapes and Industry News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the digitization of 23,000 hours of archive tape, listener feedback regarding co-host comments, and the acquisition of Club Jenna by Playboy.

topics.title: Radio Show Production and News Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal production logistics, a new comedy show, staff disputes over video monitors, and news segments regarding population growth and the death of producer Aaron Spelling.

topics.title: Aaron Spelling Career and Philanthropy
topics.summary: The studio explores the prolific television career of Aaron Spelling, his notable productions like Dynasty and Charlie's Angels, and compares his wealth to Warren Buffett's philanthropic giving.

topics.title: Cell Phone Safety and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential health risks of cell phones, celebrity deaths and legal disputes involving Anna Nicole Smith, and various updates on current films and international conflicts.
